subject: Project Management
title: The Twelve Principles
description: A quick win: understand The Twelve Principles.

hook.text: Behind the four values sit twelve principles — the operational backbone of Agile.

buildup.text: Deliver working software frequently. Welcome changing requirements, even late.

discovery.text: The best architectures emerge from self-organizing teams. Simplicity is essential.

twist.text: Most organizations adopt Agile's ceremonies but ignore its principles — doing Agile, not being Agile.

climax.text: The principles demand trust, autonomy, and face-to-face talk — the hardest things to scale.

punchline.text: Everyone reads the values. Few live the principles.

quiz.question: What do the twelve Agile principles emphasize about requirements?
options: Welcome changing requirements, even late in development
